Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x9643 "BREAKER-3B00-9643" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $3b00 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Breaker.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $3B00 which sets up the correct screen RAM and bitmap settings before starting the game.
